seoTitle: How to Find Your QuickBooks Online Company ID
metaDescription: Locate your QuickBooks Online Company ID quickly for support requests, integrations, and account verification.
intro: Your Company ID is one of those small details you don't think about until you need it — usually for tech support or connecting a third-party integration. This guide covers exactly where to find it in QuickBooks Online. It's useful for small business owners and accountants who need quick access to account-level information.

steps.heading: Locate the Company ID setting
steps.body: Navigate to your account settings where company details are listed.

steps.heading: Find your Company ID
steps.body: Look for the specific field labeled Company ID within your account information.

steps.heading: Use it for integrations or support
steps.body: Provide the ID when connecting third-party apps or contacting QuickBooks support.

steps.heading: Keep it accessible
steps.body: Save the ID somewhere secure so you don't have to search for it again next time.

faq.question: Why do I need my QuickBooks Company ID?
faq.answer: It's often required for connecting third-party integrations or verifying your account with customer support.

faq.question: Is the Company ID the same as my login username?
faq.answer: No, it's a separate identifier tied specifically to your company account, not your login credentials.

faq.question: Can I have more than one Company ID?
faq.answer: Yes, if you manage multiple companies in QuickBooks Online, each will have its own distinct Company ID.
